title: Compensation and Benefits: Expense Reimbursement
description: Conroe ISD reimburses employees for work-related expenses they pay out of pocket, such as travel, meals, and supplies purchased while carrying out district duties. The policy sets clear rules for how employees submit expense requests and what the district will and will not cover. Keeping these guidelines in place helps ensure that public funds are spent responsibly and that employees are treated fairly when they incur costs on behalf of the district.
